title: Rajasingam
desc: An orphan girl, gifted with a talent for singing, falls prey to the jealous village chief who forbids her from practising her skills. Her teacher motivates her by narrating the story of a hero.

title: Naalu Policeum Nalla Irundha Oorum
desc: Four policemen lead a peaceful and ideal life in a model village. However, their world is turned upside down when they are transferred to a riot-prone village.

title: Adhey Kangal
desc: A couple's shortcut through a haunted area sparks a series of supernatural events. They soon become entangled with the legend of Nagavali, a vengeful ghost.

title: Shiva Shakthi Thiruvilayadal
desc: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati, his wife, navigate their relationship and duties and offer sacrifices and brave separation to selflessly care for humanity.

title: Kanmani Anbudan
desc: The bond of Kanmani and Vennila, two close friends, undergoes a tough trial when they both fall in love with the same person.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
desc: Ilamathi, a courageous and kind-hearted girl, gets caught in the middle of chaos when a daring cop and a reckless goon express their affection towards her.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
desc: Born and raised in a prison, Sudar faces the numerous challenges of the outside world upon her release. Concurrently, she strives to secure her mother's freedom from incarceration.

title: Ann Mariya Kalippilanu
desc: When Annmaria decides to take revenge on her teacher, she approaches Gireesh, a thug, who later also assists her in her personal problems.

title: Asok The Lion
desc: A short-tempered auto mechanic must risk his life to protect his girlfriend after she unwittingly becomes an eyewitness to a heinous crime.

title: Skandha Sashti Kavasam
desc: A compilation of verses from a devotional song dedicated to Lord Murugan are played back to back to seek the holy blessings.

title: Shri Venkateswara Suprabhatam
desc: In veneration of Lord Venkateswara, devotees and priests listen to devotional songs and perform religious customs in order to seek his blessings.
